name: nuc14-attic
description: ASUS NUC14RVS-B (Core Ultra 9 185H, 64 GiB) in a passive enclosure. Tuned after a 2026-06-30 thermal-trip hard freeze under sustained Gemma 4 26B decode. The GPU clock governor is the primary brake (drives the package toward 72 °C by dialing gt_max_freq_mhz down to 800 MHz when needed); the soft/hard pacing thresholds are the safety net behind it.
